title: Law Challenges Doflamingo
description: Pages 1–5 focus on law challenges doflamingo, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as law's battle against Doflamingo reaches a breaking point, forcing Luffy and the others to rethink the rescue plan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I can become an officer in the family...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You done with the Assassi- Nation? Ah... not quite yet?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ... "Then go ahead and finish off that eyesore".

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: That's what the young master told M-...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ah!! I'm not supposed to say that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Now what shall we do, law...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: I was in the middle of a con- version.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Yeah, black leg came after me, so I figured some- thing must have happened.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Thanks to her, now we have no idea about the Strawhat crew's plans.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Go ahead and deploy Lao-G's group to the entrance of the smile factory.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Those guys are about to enter the ring for the finals and heat this place up....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: You alone should be enough for that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Hey now, come off it. I couldn't...

summary: Law Challenges Doflamingo focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as law's battle against Doflamingo reaches a breaking point, forcing Luffy and the others to rethink the rescue plan.
